cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out why Ms. Leibfried asked the author to recite a passage in front of the class. So the question is multiple choice with options A to D. First, I'll go back to the passage to gather clues. The author mentions that Ms. Leibfried noticed her interest in reading and writing and made her feel less shy. She even suggested a favorite novel. The big project was a book report, but Ms. Leibfried suggested the author do something a little different. The author chose a passage from "The Bell Jar" to recite. After the recitation, the class applauded, and the teacher praised
